summary: Completed comprehensive testing of News & Sentiment page with GPT-5.2 AI analysis and Auto-Trade Scheduler system. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Auth access with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/status returns status, deployment_mode, market_session, settings - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/start starts scheduler in paper mode - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/stop stops scheduler - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/emergency-stop triggers emergency stop - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/clear-emergency clears emergency state - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/notifications returns notifications array - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/execution-log returns execution log array - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/news/breaking returns breaking news array - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/news/overview returns sentiment overview with total_analyzed - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/news/analyze/AAPL returns AI-powered analysis with sentiment_score, catalyst fields - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/news/analyze/NVDA returns AI-powered analysis - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/status returns status - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan returns scan results - SUCCESS
Frontend: News page renders with search input (data-testid: news-search-input) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Quick stock buttons (NVDA, AAPL, TSLA) visible and clickable - SUCCESS
Frontend: Tabs (AI Analysis, Catalysts, Overview) present - SUCCESS
Frontend: Click NVDA loads AI analysis with sentiment score (+32 Bullish), catalyst detection, AI summary, top articles - SUCCESS
Frontend: Auto Trade page renders with PAPER badge (data-testid: deploy-mode-badge) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Scheduler status indicator shows OFF (data-testid: scheduler-status-indicator) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Start button visible (data-testid: start-scheduler-btn) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Emergency Stop button visible (data-testid: emergency-stop-btn) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Dashboard strip shows countdown timers, Market Closed badge, Cycles Run, Today P&L, Open Positions - SUCCESS
Frontend: Active Risk Limits row shows Max Daily Loss, Max Drawdown, DT Confidence, LT Confidence - SUCCESS
Frontend: Deployment Stage cards (Paper Trading, Shadow Mode, Limited Live, Full Live) all present - SUCCESS
Frontend: Scheduler Intervals sliders (DT scan, LT scan) present - SUCCESS
Frontend: Market Session Rules toggles present - SUCCESS
Frontend: Safety Controls section present - SUCCESS
Frontend: Config tab shows Day Trading, Long-Term, Risk Management settings with sliders - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: News & Sentiment engine correctly integrates GPT-5.2 for AI-powered analysis
Multi-source news aggregation (FMP, Finnhub, Alpha Vantage, Marketaux) working correctly
Catalyst detection identifies product launches, earnings, M&A events
Auto-Trade Scheduler has proper deployment stages (paper -> shadow -> limited_live -> full_live)
Market session detection correctly shows 'Market Closed' on weekends/after hours
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Safety controls (max daily loss, max drawdown, consecutive loss cooldown) properly implemented
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from financial APIs and GPT-5.2 for AI analysis
context_for_next_testing_agent: News & Sentiment page and Auto-Trade Scheduler fully tested. Key features verified: 1) News page has search input, quick stock buttons (NVDA, AAPL, TSLA, etc.), tabs (AI Analysis, Catalysts, Overview). 2) Clicking stock button loads AI-powered analysis with sentiment score, catalyst detection, AI summary, top articles. 3) Auto Trade page has PAPER badge, OFF status, Start/Emergency Stop buttons. 4) Dashboard strip shows countdown timers, market session badge, cycles run, P&L, positions. 5) Active Risk Limits row shows all risk parameters. 6) Deployment Stage cards (Paper, Shadow, Limited Live, Full Live) all present. 7) Scheduler tab has interval sliders, market session rules toggles, safety controls. 8) Config tab has Day Trading, Long-Term, Risk Management settings. Backend APIs: /api/scheduler/status, /api/scheduler/start, /api/scheduler/stop, /api/scheduler/emergency-stop, /api/scheduler/clear-emergency, /api/news/breaking, /api/news/overview, /api/news/analyze/{symbol} all working correctly.

ai_analysis.top_articles: Array with relevance scores and sentiment

auto_trade_scheduler.scheduler_intervals: DT scan (5 min), LT scan (30 min) sliders
auto_trade_scheduler.safety_controls: Max Daily Loss, Max Drawdown, Consecutive Loss Cooldown, Live Position Size, Live Confidence Boost sliders

config_tab.day_trading: Confidence, Risk/Trade, Max Positions, TP, SL, Time Exit sliders
config_tab.long_term: Confidence, Max Position, Max Positions, Trailing Stop sliders
config_tab.risk_management: Max Daily Loss, Max Drawdown, Sector Cap, Alert-Only toggle

scheduler_endpoints: GET /api/scheduler/status - Returns status, deployment_mode, market_session, settings
news_endpoints: GET /api/news/breaking - Returns breaking news with catalysts
